summary: Iteration 69 - REFACTORING TEST: Verified backend server.py refactoring to modular files (server_utils.py, routes/challenges.py, routes/festivals.py) works correctly. Found and FIXED missing import for DAILY_CHALLENGES/WEEKLY_CHALLENGES. All 15 backend tests pass, frontend loads correctly.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Missing import of DAILY_CHALLENGES and WEEKLY_CHALLENGES in server.py
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix_applied: Added 'from game_data_minigames import DAILY_CHALLENGES, WEEKLY_CHALLENGES' to server.py imports

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring was successful: server.py reduced from 15,557 to 11,608 lines
server_utils.py correctly exports GENRES, SPONSORS, TRANSLATIONS, EQUIPMENT_PACKAGES, FAME_CATEGORIES, REJECTION_REASONS, and helper functions
routes/challenges.py (991 lines) correctly handles challenge system routes with proper imports
routes/festivals.py (2,039 lines) correctly handles festival and custom festival routes
All router modules correctly use 'from database import db' and 'from auth_utils import get_current_user'
Minor issue: server.py was missing import for DAILY_CHALLENGES/WEEKLY_CHALLENGES used in /api/challenges endpoint - FIXED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring test complete. Backend code has been reorganized: 1) Constants/helpers moved to server_utils.py, 2) Festival routes extracted to routes/festivals.py, 3) Challenge routes extracted to routes/challenges.py. One bug was found and fixed: missing import for DAILY_CHALLENGES/WEEKLY_CHALLENGES. All endpoints working correctly after fix.
